message:
Running command: # Check config.json is intact with all our fixes
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | python3 -m json.tool | grep -E "DESIGN_NAME|CLOCK_PERIOD|FP_TEMPLATE|CTS_SINK|GRT_ADJ|RUN_MAGIC|RUN_LVS|SKIP" | head -20
echo "==="
# Check VERILOG_FILES count
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json') as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)
vf = cfg.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
print(f'VERILOG_FILES count: {len(vf)}')
macros = cfg.get('MACROS', {})
print(f'MACROS count: {len(macros)}')
skips = cfg.get('SKIP_STEPS', cfg.get('REMOVE_CELLS_FOR_ERC', ''))
print(f'FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS: {cfg.get(\"FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS\")}')
print(f'CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE: {cfg.get(\"CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE\")}')
"
echo "==="
# Check wrapper.v patches are still in place
head -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
grep -c "swclk\|swdi\|swdo" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v

message.content:
Welcome back! 👋

We've been working on the MSPM33C321A derivative MCU physical design. Stages 1–5 (requirements, spec, verification planning, RTL generation, and simulation — 21/21 tests passing with a clean PROCEED_TO_PNR verdict) are all complete. The last task was running Stage 6 (PnR), where we configured synthesis to cover all wrapper RTL modules except CF_SRAM hard macros, padframe/IO cells, and the sky130 standard cell library — the flow was running but the session restart has interrupted synthesis mid-way again and the process is no longer active.

Let me check the exact state and restart the flow cleanly right now.

args.thought:
Welcome back! 👋

We've been working on the MSPM33C321A derivative MCU physical design. Stages 1–5 (requirements, spec, verification planning, RTL generation, and simulation — 21/21 tests passing with a clean PROCEED_TO_PNR verdict) are all complete. The last task was running Stage 6 (PnR), where we configured synthesis to cover all wrapper RTL modules except CF_SRAM hard macros, padframe/IO cells, and the sky130 standard cell library — the flow was running but the session restart has interrupted synthesis mid-way again and the process is no longer active.

Let me check the exact state and restart the flow cleanly right now.
